message:
test(resize): expand resize_invariants from 19 to 46 inline tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add comprehensive edge-case coverage for resize invariant checking:
- Lifecycle event invariants: empty stream, valid 3-step sequence,
  event_seq/frame_seq regression detection, detail/stage mismatch for
  IntentSubmitted/ActiveCancelledSuperseded/ActivePhaseTransition variants
- Screen invariants: ExcessiveLines warning, cursor_x at cols boundary
  (valid wrap_next), cursor_x past cols warning, zero-rows edge case
- Phase transitions: Failed→Idle, Cancelled→Idle, Failed→Queued illegal,
  Committed→Queued illegal, all-phases-have-transitions,
  self-transition-always-illegal exhaustive check
- Presentation: screen/terminal mismatch, None IDs
- Telemetry: absorb clean-only report, absorb multiple reports
- Report utilities: total_checks accuracy, new report is clean
- Scheduler snapshot row: all-None clean, pending without latest,
  active with phase but no pending

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
